testsuite.name: ro.ainpc.addons.AddonRegistryTest
testsuite.system-err: Jun 10, 2026 10:28:26 PM ro.ainpc.addons.AddonRegistry logRegistrationRejection WARNING: [AINPC AddonRegistry] Descriptor respins id=self-dependency-addon origin=plugin-addon: dependency circulara pe sine: self-dependency-addon Jun 10, 2026 10:28:26 PM ro.ainpc.addons.AddonRegistry logRegistrationRejection WARNING: [AINPC AddonRegistry] Descriptor respins id=scenario-without-capability origin=plugin-addon: addon SCENARIO fara capability 'scenarios' Jun 10, 2026 10:28:26 PM ro.ainpc.addons.AddonRegistry logRegistrationRejection WARNING: [AINPC AddonRegistry] Descriptor respins id=consumer-addon origin=plugin-addon: dependency dezactivata prin configuratie: shared-lib Jun 10, 2026 10:28:26 PM ro.ainpc.addons.AddonRegistry logRegistrationRejection WARNING: [AINPC AddonRegistry] Descriptor respins id=demo-addon origin=plugin-addon: addon dezactivat prin configuratie: demo-addon Jun 10, 2026 10:28:26 PM ro.ainpc.addons.AddonRegistry logRegistrationRejection WARNING: [AINPC AddonRegistry] Descriptor respins id=advanced-only origin=plugin-addon: runtime incompatibil: curent=standalone, suportat=advanced
